translated: [CORNER: Opening Skit] Tomari-chan, we've really become a great duo, haven't we?
Now that you mention it, it's been quite a while since
I became a main personality alongside you, Kanon-senpai.
At first, I really worried about what we should talk about.
I remember you asking me if I was enjoying school.
I remember clearly how you told me
that you were having fun back then.
Of course, even now, I find school, school idols, and this radio show very enjoyable.
I can really tell how much you're enjoying this show, Tomari-chan.
After all, we're always facing each other like this during recordings.
Yes, I can see your expressions very clearly, Kanon-senpai.
Laughing, being troubled, being surprised...
You're so expressive that I never get tired of watching you.
Wait, really?
When you put it like that, it makes me feel like I don't have much of a "senpai" vibe.
Don't you have any thoughts like, "She's so reliable" or "She's so sharp"?
That's a difficult question.
It's that difficult?!
I'm just joking.
Of course I rely on you.
Oh, good.
I was getting a little worried.
Chi-chan once told me that I might act a bit childish on the radio.
I understand.
Since my way of talking is quite detached, you act that way on purpose to liven things up, right?
Huh?
Oh, well, I guess there's a bit of that...
Maybe.
But I think the main reason is that I really trust you, Tomari-chan.
Trust?
You're always so on top of things.
Your talk and timekeeping are perfect, so I think I've ended up depending on you.
It's not very good of me as your senior, is it?
No, it allows me to see a side of you that you don't show on stage,
and that honestly makes me happy.
Tomari-chan, you're such a good girl!
Let's keep delivering a fun radio show together from here on out.
Agreed.
Now, let's get today's recording started!
Yeah!
